message:
feat(config): Implement worker configuration system (bead ac7)

- Add rchd/src/config.rs with TOML-based configuration loading
- Support workers.toml for defining remote workers
- Support daemon.toml for daemon settings
- Load workers at daemon startup and populate WorkerPool
- Provide example configuration generators

Features:
- WorkersConfig: Define workers with host, user, slots, priority, tags
- DaemonConfig: Socket path, health check interval, connection pooling
- Automatic filtering of disabled workers
- Configuration directory detection via directories crate

4 new tests (43 total), all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
